# Product Publishing Template

Copy this file to `src/content/products/your-product-slug.md` and replace all placeholder values.

Do not publish this template file directly.

---

```yaml
---
title: "Your Product Name"
description: "Short summary of the resource, guide, or download."
slug: your-product-slug
price: Free
status: available
featured: false
download: 
github: https://github.com/your-org/your-repo
tags:
  - resources
  - open-source
coverImage: /images/your-product-cover.png
---
```

## Overview

Describe what the product is, who it is for, and the problem it solves.

## Features

List key capabilities, formats, or deliverables included.

## Usage

Provide setup instructions, examples, and operational guidance.

## Support and Updates

Document maintenance expectations, version notes, and contribution paths.
